errorBoundary.panelGeneric: An unexpected error occurred in this panel.

app.name: Lyricist Pro
app.tagline: A professional-grade AI lyrics editor designed for songwriters and poets. Craft your masterpiece with real-time suggestions, structure management, and intelligent quantization.

leftPanel.title: Lyricist Pro
leftPanel.suggestTooltip: Suggest a random topic, mood & title

emptyState.title: Ready to write your next masterpiece?
emptyState.description: Configure your song settings in the sidebar or import existing lyrics to begin.

markupMode.title: Markdown Mode
markupMode.hint: Format: [Section Name] followed by lyrics. Separate sections with double newlines.

textMode.title: Text Mode
textMode.hint: Write freely without formatting. Your text will be preserved when switching modes.

phoneticMode.title: Phonetic Mode
phoneticMode.description: Pure IPA rendering of your lyrics
phoneticMode.hint: Generated with the selected language or dialect: {lang}
phoneticMode.placeholder: Phonetic transcription appears here once lyrics are available.

editor.regenerateWarning: This will fully regenerate the current lyrics. Do you want to continue?
editor.adaptLine: Adapt this line to target language

suggestions.title: AI Suggestions
suggestions.empty: Select a line to explore AI-powered alternatives.

musical.title: Musical Prompt Generator
musical.description: Define the sonic landscape for your lyrics
musical.instrumentationPlaceholder: e.g. Warm analog synths, acoustic guitar, heavy 808s...
musical.rhythmPlaceholder: e.g. Steady 4/4 pulse, syncopated groove, half-time feel...
musical.narrativePlaceholder: e.g. Cinematic build, melancholic introspection, anthemic release...
musical.autoSuggestLabel: AI-powered suggestions based on your lyrics, topic & mood
musical.promptPlaceholder: Your structured musical prompt (STYLE, MOOD, VOCALS, INSTRUMENTATION, RHYTHM, STRUCTURE, MIX/SPACE, REFERENCES, DELIVERY) will appear here...
musical.promptStructureHint: Keep the musical prompt labeled (STYLE, MOOD, VOCALS, INSTRUMENTATION, RHYTHM, STRUCTURE, MIX/SPACE, REFERENCES, DELIVERY) so AI music tools don't miss critical context.
musical.optimizedFor: Optimized for Suno, Udio, and Stable Audio
musical.contextInfo: Context: lyrics, topic & mood are taken into account
musical.vibeBoardDescription: Select your genre to auto-set BPM & instruments

analysis.title: Song Analysis Report
analysis.musicalSuggestionsMovedHint: Musical suggestions available in the Musical tab

similarity.title: Similarity Check
similarity.subtitle: Top 3 songs discovered with any similarity score.
similarity.empty: No saved song exceeded the 50% similarity threshold.
similarity.noCandidates: Save or generate at least one song version to compare similarities.
similarity.thresholdHint: Songs are ordered from most to least similar, regardless of score.
similarity.webIdle: No search run yet. The engine triggers automatically after 30 s of inactivity (≥ 20 % text change), or click Refresh.
similarity.webNoMatches: ✓ No significant external matches found. Your lyrics appear original.

saveToLibrary.title: Library
saveToLibrary.saveDescription: Add this song to your personal library
saveToLibrary.browseDescription: Open your library and manage saved songs
saveToLibrary.empty: No songs in library yet. Save this song to start building your collection.
saveToLibrary.loadDescription: Load this song into the editor
saveToLibrary.storageScopeLocal: Library data covers only lyricist_library. Browser usage and limit are global estimates for this browser when available.
saveToLibrary.purgeWarning: This will permanently delete all songs from your library. This action cannot be undone.

paste.title: Paste Lyrics
paste.description: Paste your existing lyrics below. Our AI will analyze them to extract the structure, rhyme scheme, syllable count, and core concepts to fit into the editor.

importDialog.title: Load lyrics
importDialog.emptyDescription: Choose a .txt or .md file to analyze and import into the editor.
importDialog.replaceDescription: The imported lyrics will replace the current lyrics, structure, and analysis context.
importDialog.warning: Your current work will be lost once the imported file is analyzed.
importDialog.supportedFiles: Supports TXT, Markup, ODT, DOCX, or pasted lyrics

exportDialog.title: Save / Export lyrics
exportDialog.description: Choose a single format for this export.

keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.description: Reference the active shortcuts available in Lyricist Pro.

shortcuts.undo: Undo the latest change outside text inputs.
shortcuts.redo: Redo the latest reverted change outside text inputs.
shortcuts.dismissNavigation: Close the settings, about, similarity, or mobile side panels.
shortcuts.dismissFileDialogs: Close the import, export, versions, or library dialogs.
shortcuts.dismissAiDialogs: Close AI prompts, API alerts, analysis, or pasted-lyrics import dialogs.

about.description: A professional-grade AI lyrics editor designed for songwriters and poets. Craft your masterpiece with real-time suggestions, structure management, and intelligent quantization.
about.splashAutoClose: This window will close automatically in {seconds} seconds.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.onboarding: What would you like to know or do?
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask anything about your lyrics or composition…
aiAssistant.error: Unable to get a response. Please try again.

tooltips.aiUnavailableHelp: Set GEMINI_API_KEY in your Vercel project environment variables (Settings → Environment Variables) and redeploy.
tooltips.quantize: Adjust all lines to match the target syllable count while maintaining meaning
tooltips.analyzeTheme: Analyze song structure, rhyme quality, and emotional impact
tooltips.regenerate: Rewrite the entire song based on current settings and topic
tooltips.theme: Switch between light and dark theme
tooltips.normalizeStructure: Reorganize sections into standard song structure: Intro → Verse/Pre-Chorus/Chorus → Bridge → Outro
tooltips.generateSong: Generate a new song with AI
tooltips.quantizeSection: Adjust lines in this section to match the syllable target
tooltips.adaptSong: Translate and adapt the entire song to {lang} (creative adaptation, not literal translation)
tooltips.sectionAdapt: Adapt this section to the selected language
tooltips.generateMusical: Generate a musical prompt for AI music tools
tooltips.checkSimilarity: Compare this song with saved song versions and show the closest matches
tooltips.moodPresets: Choose a preset mood for your song
tooltips.rhymeScheme: Select the default rhyme pattern for all sections
tooltips.targetSyllables: Set the target number of syllables per line
tooltips.viewMode: Switch between different lyrics editor views
tooltips.browseLibrary: Save or browse your song library
tooltips.sendToSuno: Open SUNO with your musical prompt

adaptationProgress.pipelineFailed: Adaptation pipeline failed. Check console for details.

promptModal.saveVersionMessage: Enter a name for this version:

rhythmicCoherence.title: Rhythmic Coherence Check
rhythmicCoherence.optionADescription: Adjust the musical prompt tempo/style to match the lyrics density.
rhythmicCoherence.optionBDescription: View lines that are too long and trim them.
rhythmicCoherence.tooLongLines: Lines that may be too dense:
